info.title: Scrape Creators API
info.description: The easiest way to scrape public social media data at scale. Extract profiles, posts, videos, comments, and more from TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook, Reddit, and 15+ platforms.

tags.name: Instagram
tags.description: Gets Instagram profiles, posts, and reels

get.description: Gets public Instagram profile data, recent posts, and related accounts

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: Instagram handle

parameters.name: trim
parameters.description: Set to true to get a trimmed response

user.biography: Building scrapecreators.com | The easiest way to get public social media data at scale

biography_with_entities.raw_text: Building scrapecreators.com | The easiest way to get public social media data at scale

get.description: Get a basic profile by user id.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Instagram user id

get.description: Get a persons public posts. *Play counts can sometimes be inaccurate* Play counts are Instagram-only. When a Reel is also cross-posted to Facebook, Instagram (behind login) shows you the combined IG + FB views. But this API will only return the Instagram views.

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: Instagram handle

parameters.name: next_max_id
parameters.description: Cursor to get next page of results.

parameters.name: trim
parameters.description: Set to true to get a trimmed response

caption.text: 5 best college baseball regional plays for day 1

get.description: Retrieve public post/reel details. *Play counts can sometimes be inaccurate* Play counts are Instagram-only. When a Reel is also cross-posted to Facebook, Instagram (behind login) shows you the combined IG + FB views. But this API will only return the Instagram views.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: Instagram post or reel URL

parameters.name: trim
parameters.description: Set to true to get a trimmed response

node.text:
I think I like this goosey life🪿☺️🍃

#crunchy #crunchymom #dayinthelife #holistic #nontoxic #homeschool #crunchymoms #momhumor #momlife #jane #janeinsane

get.description: Get the transcript of an Instagram post or reel. This is a little slow since I run it through an AI. You can only get a transcript if the video is under 2 minutes. You should get results in 10-30 seconds. If no one is spreaking it should return null. Since some posts are carousel, it will return a transcript for each item in the carousel.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: Instagram post or reel URL

transcripts.text: Let's fry up the perfect bunzel. Beautiful.  Everybody, shh. The perfect bunzel. Let me show you my bunzel. When it comes down to bunzel, we make it the crispiest, get the crunch. Heaven.

get.description: Search for reels by keyword. Uses Google Search to find reels. This is because IG puts search behind the login, and we only scrape public data

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The keyword to search for

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number to return.

reels.caption:
Dogs are family 💙

I met Rocco, a little rescue Chihuahua all the way from Mexico 🇲🇽🐾 

He’s looked after by a lovely lady who’s always had dogs, but when she lost her last one, she thought that was it, the loss is too painful to go through again. But babysitting Rocco gives her her “dog fix” and keeps her connected to the love only dogs can bring 🥰

She’s originally from Los Angeles, but now a New Yorker, and knows Central Park inside out from years of walking dogs there 🌳🐕 

She told me how dogs are family, and people who don’t love animals will never fully understand it, and I completely agree! ❤️

#dogphotography #rescuedog #chihuahua #dogportrait #dogphotographer

location.name: Central Park, New York City
location.address_json: {"street_address": "5th Avenue & 59th Street - Grand Army Plaza", "zip_code": "10019", "city_name": "New York, New York", "region_name": "", "country_code": "", "exact_city_match": false, "exact_region_match": false, "exact_country_match": false}

get.description: Get comments from an Instagram post or reel

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL of the post or reel to get comments from

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: The cursor to get more comments. Get 'cursor' from previous response.

comments.text: "...but who wants to know people who don't love animals anyway?". ❤️

get.description: Get all public reels from a profile. Can provide a user_id or handle, but for faster response times, use user_id. This won't include pinned reels right now. And I'm not sure why, but it looks like IG doesn't return the description of the reel on this endpoint :( You'll have to use the post detail endpoint to get that. *Play counts can sometimes be inaccurate* Play counts are Instagram-only. When a Reel is also cross-posted to Facebook, Instagram (behind login) shows you the combined IG + FB views. But this API will only return the Instagram views.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Instagram user id. Use this for faster response times.

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: Instagram handle. Use user_id for faster response times.

parameters.name: max_id
parameters.description: Max id to get more reels. Get 'max_id' from previous response.

parameters.name: trim
parameters.description: Set to true for a trimmed down version of the response

caption.text:
Summer brings out all the girlies, soda, and global warming!!!🤗☀️

#states #utah #idaho #california #oregon #newyork #minnesota #arizona #alaska #girlies #jane #janeinsane #eastcoast #westcoast #drama

get.description: Get story highlights from an Instagram user

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Instagram user id. Use for faster response times.

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: Instagram handle. Use user_id for faster response times.

get.description: Get details about a specific highlight

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the highlight to get details for

get.description: Instagram removed the public pages for this, so now we can't scrape it anymore :(

parameters.name: audio_id
parameters.description: If you're looking for this, it is sometimes called 'audio_cluster_id', or it can be just 'audio_id'.

parameters.name: max_id
parameters.description: How you paginate the results. Pass the max_id from the previous response to get the next set of reels.
